message:
feat(vdbe,core,func): thread CollationRegistry through engine and fix MakeRecord IPK alignment

Wire a shared CollationRegistry from Connection through the VDBE engine,
sorter, and all comparison/collation paths so dynamically loaded collations
(e.g. via icu_load_collation) participate in ORDER BY, DISTINCT, index
probes, and PRAGMA collation_list.

Also fix MakeRecord to write a NULL placeholder for INTEGER PRIMARY KEY
columns instead of omitting them entirely, producing SQLite-compatible
on-disk record layouts. Test assertions updated to expect the new payload
shape including the IPK NULL sentinel.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
